title: Smoky Yautia Fry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Indian-inspired dish featuring yautia, a type of root vegetable. This smoky yautia fry is a delicious side dish or main course option.

ingredients.name: yautia
ingredients.notes: peeled and cut into small wedges

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add yautia and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add smoky, stir, fry, garam masala, and salt. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to medium-low and cook, covered, until yautia is tender, about 15-20 minutes.
Add water and stir to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
